content: if you're getting an alarm, you know, the thing you get when your kid might be dying, the app will still force you to download a new version before letting you either silence it or maybe check on the kid dying status. in addition to the device having a 3 to 4 in range, absolutely horrible experience.

You really need to improve the playback and stability of this app... I can't even watch old video now without it stuttering like crazy. This also seems to be an Android issue (I'm using an S25 Ultra) because my wife's iPhone 13 is fine... Focus on fixing the app interface and quality of life, then the camera itself. Then do the scummy subscription stuff.. Product care first come on.
imagine if the problems with streaming apps from 10-15 years ago were here today. like, w t f? I need stuff I spend lots of money on to work like it was made this decade
pretty good 😊
Clue is incredible! Clue has always been so accurate, it always predicts things correctly and I never wonder why I feel a certain way when I'm on my period anymore.
cover all aspect of baby care from feed to feel sleepy.

This period app has good functions & info BUT the types of ads and their frequency is 👎 To enter data I get an unskippable full ad page that I have to sit on & wait for it to 'fake' load then click X inconveniently placed top left. I know about the paid features and I don't need/want the paid version. I wouldn't mind the ads or having to see features everywhere I cannot use if it didn't have me wait. It's made me spiteful, I'll never pay 🤷‍♀️. Please stop annoying your users.
The most important things on this app are only unlocked by money. What's the point of it anyways?
doesnt track right and isnt accurate

update based on comment - I do not have any other accounts. I have just been billed for a subscription to this app and have no recollection of downloading the app in the first place or signing up for it. When i try and manage my subscription it goes to Google play subscription and doesn't show the app there so I cannot cancel it. Please stop charging me
very bad

I used to love this app and product but it has become so unreliable! the split screen feature does not work, when you flip back and forth one video stream is always disconnected and I have to quit the app every single time! also we recently tried to travel with the flex stand and the instructions make it seem so simple to connect to hotel wifi or another wifi network and it didn't work at all! honestly the app gets worse each update and pointless.
Broke in 3.31, fixed the next day in 3.32. Thanks for the quick turnaround! Works well for monitoring. No longer use the biometrics, but camera and microphone are intuitive and painless to operate.
Love this app and my dream sock!
I can't use the sock anymore because every time I bounce my baby it beeps at me constantly and keeps her awake, the only thing I can use is the camera.

this app has made our lives so much less stressful to know our baby is safe when we are sleeping. I only give 4 stars because we didn't know that we were going to be charged monthly on top of the expensive purchase but the app just automatically started deducting money out of our bank account every month thru the app store even though we never agreed to the payment, we just noticed it later on our bank statements and we realized we were being charged. Great product but subscription service sucks

enshittification has been enabled for this app unfortunately. 8 months ago it used to be that you could see up to 7 days worth of clips so you could go back and grab a special moment, now you need to pay extra for that storage, the fact that I can pay and get that clip means they're already storing it in the hopes that I pay? I'm sorry, but that's simply obscene that you'd bother storing it if you won't let me access it without even mentioning the darker implications that may have for privacy.

I'm disappointed with how consistent the network connectivity issues are. i have to reconnect nearly every single time I need to change the volume or pick a new episode. even just to adjust the light. and i don't close the app, i'll have it open on my phone the entire time and it'll freeze and require I reconnect. it's infuriating. We also wish there were more episodes and stories. lulu and moon specifically. also, can we add a loop/repeat option for stuff? the good sounds timeout...
will not go full screen on my Chromebook

Love this app for the pump. pumping sessions and measuring are inaccurate. hate it for the thermometer will not come out of Celsius into Fahrenheit it says it's Fahrenheit but it's showing the temp in Celsius

title: Great technology
content: Such a clever piece of equipment. Neat, comfortable, great games, amazing to see progress.
I used to love the app, but lately EVERY SINGLE time I open it, I'm hit by a page (or two) telling me to subscribe to clue plus. I wish I started with an app that didn't advertise this much.
beautiful apps best app on the world

"Maybe delulu is the solulu" oh yay wow my period tracker is using mental health terms in a way that waters delusions down completely for their marketing. yayy casual ableism from my period tracker. Misusing mental health terms like "delusional" as slang for wishful thinking (delulu) only causes more stigma and doubt for those who actually experience delusions. I sure wonder how you feel about your mentally ill userbase.

Overall app is decent enough to leave some free features out that are necessary. This app used to be really good but the time when it irritates with those premium pop-ups I can't trust this app anymore. Can't believe apps like these do things like day by day making a feature premium until you can't even use the app properly, although tracking normal things works well. Originally the app is perfect but just making every feature a premium is not welcomed by users a lot.

I used to absolutely love this app but now it shows ads to upgrade your account every time you use it which feels really frustrating. The only reason I haven't switched to a new app yet is because all my data is saved here.

Dark patterns everywhere. don't click on anything that looks like a paid subscription that you must opt into. the top right of the pop up hides the x for the window and they make it the same color as the foreground so it doesn't appear.
Very inaccurate period cycle tracker. It doesn't synchronize its data well. It is the worst app I have ever used.
reliable and let's you step away and still be there

This app lags SO much. The sock will alert and beep loudly saying it's getting bad readings even though its literally fine. When you go into app to shut it off half the time the app takes 3 times of opening and closing it to actually respond and be able to shut it off, so the whole time its beeping like crazy overwhelming you and baby. Then the correct or current readings take forever to display.
the camera software is absolute dog water. it really struggles to produce an image. likely because the app is so bloated now.

The camera is quality but the app is just awful. Every update it keeps defaulting my custom settings. I've lost the "baby is detected" alert even though there's no option to toggle it. My auto capture photos keeps toggling itself on and off. It regularly loses connection to the Cubo device, and it's not my Internet as my Ring camera is absolutely fine. The app never used to be this bad but they've just made it worse over time

app was working well on the first couple of days but now we can't even log in after reinstalling the app after the app wouldn't see the pumps. Needs fixing now. keeps saying can't connect to the internet but can send an email just fine to reset password.

the app was working great when I first purchased the pump accuracy of fill was a little off but shimmying usually helped. Now my pumps won't connect and I have the air1. A little annoying to not be able to be able to control the pump through the app though the pumps do still work and seems like a couple of bugs that need fixed. the pump themselves though-🤌✨️
App barely works with pump
The update has made my app unable to connect to my pumps.
I lost all my data. cant even log in. im using the air one pumps. im so pissed off about this. recommend the pumps but dont use this app to track. I lost all of my data, I was at 4500 Oz.

Can't log in or sign up The app says I have an account already, I try to send a password reset email and nothing comes through. I try to just make a new account on sign up with email and it says "There has been an error. Check your spelling or try another email" but no other email works! I've made sure there's no spacing, everything spelt right, I've tried 3 emails and nothing allows me in
it is quite accurate to when your period happens
they suddenly stop the stream.. this iis so dangerous.. no one use this
Seemed nice at first, but became unreliable. Loaded with unnecessary features, but seems to lack a couple basic ones most parents would want.

undo the last update - it now takes forever for my camera to load. you can have 4/5 stars afterwards but as of now....wt ef was that update because it made your app soo unused friendly (when my kid is making a noise I want to be able to see him asap not wait 3mins for the camera yo load!)
Love Nanit, we use the activity tracker every day
keeps crashing. won't even open. *fixed and now working. Thank you!!!!

het idee van de app is en blijft goed, gebruikte de app 8-9 jaar geleden ook. alleen is de kwaliteit enorm achteruit en functies veel slechter geworden. De app crasht constant, loopt vast, slaagt voedingen niet op, blog staat in het Frans ?, er staan spelfouten in teksten,... het overzicht vroeger gaf een mooi beeld van gemiddelde voedingen voor een periode met gemiddelde duur. deze functie is ook volledig verdwenen.
gud
poor
started using it bc of privacy policy. erasing because you cant edit your dates without subscribing
good

over all I like it. it is good enough that I paid for the premium version after a couple of months. the only problem i have is that I can't link it to Samsung or my fitness pal so some of the tracking functions aren't useful.

This was meant to be the next gen in biometric data. At least a proto type. And it actually ROSE to the occasion big time. Well done team, you got the point so much it's like you were the point or something. Good job

Horrible don't like the app. why should I have to pay a monthly fee to learn about premenopause update 4/19/2026 even though I didn't like this app used it for years yo track.my personal menopause. got charge for upgrade but never recieved it in the app. they will steal you money for no upgrade. removing app because they stole $ from me and its horrible. Give me my money back and will be set!

nothing but issues, especially lately. heart rate keeps disappearing, video keeps stop/loading. video gets stuck on the try again or just flat out frezes. to get out of the video, i have to go under apps in settings and force stop cause not even closing the app works. ive had sound messing up (one time it sounded like a haunted house). we have good internet and everything. plus husband has it up on his phone and the issues happen at different times so thats why i believe its app issues..
The app continues to crash constantly
good and the prediction is very accurate
Super Nice and Super beautiful and Super gorgeous and Super wonderful and Super great and Super good and Super amazing
best
Good app but the ads and pop ups r incredibly annoying and too much
amazing app

TLDR don't reccomend free version of app, (disruptive adds 4 paid version) Paid version feels overpriced even when on sale. Used since 2017. First few years u could log days of period in 1 go-helpful 4 me as I often forget to track each day, I could tick all days in one go @ end of period. App has now been changed so more time consuming to track each day. Adds for paid version block screen for a few seconds every time u log a symptom. Can't export data. I'm going to switch 2 a better app.

I wanted to like this app, but it really bothers me that lots of things are locked behind a pay wall. And even the things that aren't, when you click on them you are constantly prompted to subscribe to the Plus version. I appreciate the intelligent design, but I would have hoped that an app that seems to want to be compassionate, non judgemental, and accessible, would be a little less pushy on the subscription aspect. Especially given the fact that lots of people can not afford to pay.

not horrible, but not great. they shove premium in your face with every tap & everything interesting is behind a pay wall. there are better tracking apps out there that dont beg for your money and hide YOUR information from YOU unless you pay them.
Great thing to use .... women need not tk depend on their memory or anyone else to mark their ovulation period
very helpful and understands every thing....very thank full 👍🤗☺️

Terrible. You mean to tell me that I have to pay just to provide extra important info about how I feel but you have no issues on showing adult content/adult toys on the app when there's most likely minors using the app? Ridiculous. At least age restrict certain things.
worked for years on 2 different tablets until last update. now it crashes when loading camera view on both machines. uninstalled,restarted,reinstalled, same results

the sock is pretty great, its accurate as long as your baby doesn't move too much. HATE the camera. constant connection issues. annoying blue light shines on baby whenever it disconnects from app. better off with a good ol VTech baby monitor.
This app rarely works when I need it to. reliability is non-existent.

This app has gotten progressively worse with each update. In its current form it's basically useless. Crashes constantly and it takes multiple tries to connect. switching back and forth to full screen always breaks the connection and is difficult to reconnect.
Ever since updating the app I cant see my babies sleep status live anymore or see how many hours baby slept. Frustrating.
I don't understand how it can be so difficult to get a camera to connect to an app and to wifi! worst product ever!
the app could use some work
It is difficult to set up with wifi.
it helps to track your periods and it's real , I love it
worst app ever
It works amazing ,no ads just a simple way to track my cycle. love this app:)
I love clue stuff much, it's really helpful. it's helps me track my period accurately I'm so happy
Useless unless you have standard cycles

I've been using this app for many, many years, perhaps a decade or so, always for free and it's been an invaluable help. I've always loved how useful and accurate (for me) its predictions were and how it used inclusive language, making me feel comfortable. I no longer get periods nowadays, but I just decided to sign up for a year of Plus just to support them and thank the devs for everything.
It is very good actually
great app
Trying to conceive home screen not working, but cycle tracking is good.
Works great

DO NOT BUY this absolute garbage. App almost never connects to camera properly, has been this way for 2 years. Sometimes you get audio with no video, sometimes wife can connect but not me, sometimes neither while our kid is screaming and we can't see. Camera also claims to have poor Wi-Fi connectivity, it's 6ft from router. Like many here I am unimpressed but trapped because I already own it.
slow and laggy

The sock will stop receiving signal anytime you are holding the baby, changing the baby, the baby is moving, ect. Basically the only time the sock can communicate with the base, that is only 8 foot away, is when the baby is peacefully sleeping. The app is utter garbage. It will auto pick the resolution for the cam even if your system can't support it. You cannot change it either because it will always default back to 2k resolution resulting in a blue screen of death anytime you click on the cam
Camera disconnects all the time. I have to restart the app 100 times a day
Horrible connectivity issues
worst app wasted 4,5 hours tried to connect it to device or c2 error
This is very useful app. love it 🤍
good
Neither lets you sign in to your previous account nor sends a recovery email to reset password, nor let's you create a new account with the same email address 😔
Great
99.99 accurate and would definitely advice women to use it to track their period

This is a good app. I love it but the only reason I have given it 3 stars is because even though I am not paying for premium, at least I should be able to view symptoms I have tracked on my previous cycles. I don't have to see the app's analysis but the symptoms keyed in.
great
constant crash now. worked for years. restarted device, uninstall, reinstall, still crash. Uninstall, power off, power on, reinstall, still buggy.

The physical device is great... The app... fails consistently on all devices across all platforms. You need to restart the app every time you come back to it as it's often faster than waiting a few minutes for it to finally reconnect to the camera. not the end of the world, but now I write this review because one of my devices that has been working fine can no longer OPEN THE APP AT ALL, even after restarting the phone. Devs. fix the app.

This app is so maddening. When it works, it's great. The picture in picture is great. But it hangs constantly or loses connection with the camera, so I have to close and reopen the app throughout the day to get it to work again. we just use the camera. Video quality is fine but the audio can be spotty at times. Overall just feels like a really rough app for such an expensive product.
absolutely love it

This app is pretty much one of two things that have the ability to make me angry on a daily basis. So buggy for something *so* incredibly simple. An old school alarm clock has more several times more utility than this product + app. over it.

None of the sleep sounds stay on, the app constantly loses connection to the device and the stories cut in and out constantly. The device is already expensive and having to pay a monthly subscription on top of it not working half the time is so frustrating.
great for periods
it is very useful for students who had no time to focus on their health and constantly worried about their regular periods can definitely benefited 🙏
not always accurate but it's close
fix your widget also app is not loading when I have bad connection for some reason? it's ridiculous that you need Internet to check your cycle
it doesn't want to work because I'm 13

I love this app. I had this app on 2022 when I was pregnant with my son. I recently found out I am pregnant and could not remember the name i searched 4 days for this app. It is very user friendly so happy I found it.
just spent hundreds of dollars and it's not compatible with my device

useless once your baby moves into their own room. baby is a few feet away in the room next door but the base cant connect to the sock due to the wall. however, putting the base in the baby's room is pointless as the app only sends alerts with sound if you have the app open, when closed it only sends a push notification and unless you're staring at your phone all night its useless. ive gone through every phone and app setting to see if there is a work around but there isnt
Used it for my first and now using it for my second child, it's been working wonderfully
Brilliant experience. The app runs well, is so easy to use. The games are so much fun and it doesn't even feel like training!
Really accurate and useful

I'm giving it one star because I subscribed by mistake and when I asked for my refund several times very soon after no one replied from the app even though EU law mandates refund periods. Now I'm stuck with a paid account I don't want or need and I refuse to use it since refund request was ignored. I'm sorry to see such bad business practices.
Helps track my days very well.

I would have given it 5 stars but I am EXTREMELY disappointed that they took away the ovulation period from the free version. I am now on the lookout for a new app. I was debating paying for the full version as there is so much education put in as well but if theyre taking things away from the free version for people that cant afford the subscription, ill take my money elsewhere
Is a really helpful app for pregnancy
It's Real Great For Tracking everything About Our Baby

Perifit Care gives you confidence! Kegel exercise has never been this entertaining and it is great to be sure that you are doing it right. I look forward to doing my pelvic floor exercises now. Before Perifit Care it felt like a burden. Now I can happily train my pelvic floor, track my progress and look forward to real results. I recommend this incredible tool to all of my friends! I honestly believe that every single woman should own a Perifit Care.
Very helpful and easy to navigate. It has tons of information however you have to pay for a lot of it. It's simple but effective. I love this app.
good app i check. my daught.

It is a really good app to track your body. It help me a lot like I was keep on forgetting the dates of my period but this app make me remember and also tell me that what is going on in my body what wrong with my body and make me aware about my body. You can try this but it's a lot more better to try it with the subscription.
nice app for women's
uploads from the camera regularly max out upload speeds and cause hitching in your Internet connection. reached out to their support with proof and they told me to shove off.

This was a gift from my sister in law after a week stay in the NICU after a few complications, including low oxygen saturation. It gave me peace of mind when we came home from the hospital, and my husband and I can rest a lot easier.
Love the app and devices, gave me peace of mind. The only issue I have is that if the socks runs out of juice the base thinks it's a connection issue and sends out alerts constantly, please fix this

Whilst the sock works well in tracking (though has very limited Bluetooth range), the dream camera is abysmal in WiFi range. The mic and camera sensor are perfect, don't get me wrong. But sadly the range is ridiculous! Whilst the signal from the router only goes through one joist floor and a total distance of about 4 meters, the signal is so poor it's always showing weak or fair (even though our phones show full WiFi bars). Besides, most of the time the feed skips and or doesn't work at all.

I think it's very clear they put more effort and documentation for iOS users instead of Android. The ability to do anything on this app is sub par at best and nothing matches their documentation for any procedure you might need to do. It's a garbage user experience at best.

Paying a subscription for an app this broken is ludicrous. Notification issues, sign in issues, connection issues, and the UI is terrible and feels untested. near impossible to pinch zoom in without rewinding. Customer support is often "delete the app and reinstall, sign in and sign out". Hasn't fixed any issues we've had. Customer service is typically prompt in replies however.
Heaps of the features are now behind paywall
Enjoyable way and educational way to work on my pelvic. health
nice app 💯 I love it

This app has been very helpful for keeping track since I have a very irregular period. My only suggestion to the devs would be that the symbols used for inputting the period flow were also used as the marker on the actual calendar itself, instead of the singular drop icon (though that still works for prediction and spotting!) But otherwise, it works well!
I'm replacing this garbage product with something way cheaper that I guarantee will work better. Endless buffering and it wont even detect the camera anymore. Garbage garbage garbage.
constantly freezes, goes black, or won't load the feed during the night. Not reliable

very awkward to make the app work, but eventually after 2 days of poking and prodding we got it to work and it seems to be worth the money... they really need to sort out the app though, people without patience will not put up with how slow and misleading the app is.
paid over £300 and there's a paywall?!?

thieves - mandatory subscription for basic features like weaning mode. paid 1700 for a snoo and now have to pay $20 a month for using basic features. this is disgusting, morally wrong, financially greedy and disturbing. I will actively make sure nobody in my circle of influence buys this. I don't know how y'all sleep at night

I've been using Clue for 10+ years and have always loved it but honestly the constant push to subscribe to Plus is making me want to look for something else. I get that an app like this has to make its money but I don't need any of the paid features. I've been hitting "no thanks" for years, you're not going to convince me to pay for something I don't need, you're going to drive me to another platform.
Very helpful with very modular controls. Easy to use and understand. Lots of community support. Very clear and protective data policies.
Besides having to do everything online, and not being able to access it properly offline, this app is the one for me.

Was good when it worked but I just lost all my data with an update because I was using the old version and wasn't warned this would happen when updating. It was only after it was suggested I save data from the previous version once that data couldn't be retrieved.
the app itself is good to track your period but it would be Even better if it didn't give out different options to kids under the age ifykyk
love the app...so gentle with me😅🩷
not accurate
I love it so real and genuine
love the nanit and the app is easy to use. the only con is I can't seem to get the video of the monitor to sync and display on my Google home display
Really helps to see the quality of sleep your baby is having and helps you manage it better.
it's somewhat accurate with its data. I think the time spent crying is off and sometimes it doesnt catch wakeups but overall still a really nice tool.
ever since the update, I cannot view the owl camera. I have Samsung 22
Decently good but no way to adjust the parameters for the alarms.... also It loses connection all the time. However, does give me peace of mind.
Difficult to troubleshoot and you will have issues
this app sucks. why do you need a subscription to access everything? buyer beware. spend $80 to subscribe to another subscription. no thanks

It's kind of ok, but it's got a lot of glitches. the app doesn't connect to the device very well, it often loses connection for no reason and then the device needs to be reset and re added again. using two people was glitchy and unreliable. edit: lowered to a 2 because it got even worse.
I love this alarm

title: Really works and it’s fun
content: The Perifit is great. The exercises are fun and I’ve seen results when I’ve kept up with doing them regularly. Would highly recommend :)
it's good but all the same as any other app, you gotta have a subscription or pay something to learn more about what's going on with your body 😗
good app.very helpful to assist in tracking period and pregnancy
i say that this is so useful to us
why do i need to be +13? im 11 and I just wanna track when im finna bleed again😭

used to be a great app but is now completely unusable because an ad pops up every single click. Things that used to be free are now pay walled. If I accidentally track something for the wrong day, I can't even edit it anymore without paying. So sad to see what this app has become.

I found this on TikTok and I really want to support it because It's advertised as made by women. Ive been using a different app for about 5 years and I wanted to switch to this but it's money grabbing y'all. Everytime you move it wants you to unlock premium. Ill stick with what I'm using because it doesn't remind me to pay to use the app every minute that I use it.
Ovia is amazing!!!!!! It helped me track a pregnancy plus it also helped me figure out my most fertile days to aid in getting pregnant. Love, love, love Ovia! ❤️❤️❤️
it's been helpful
Ever since the update my wife and I cannot view the live feed at the same time. It will just keep circling.
doesn't have a lot of male options, but has a really good fan sound and waking up to lights vice an annoying beep is pretty cool.

It is difficult to conceive a product this bad made it to the market. The Hatch is by far my most hated possession. It turns on and off randomly, loses connection, and simply does not work smoothly. The app is cluttered and unintuitive. The problem is that its features are genuinely useful. But using this app while trying to calm a baby is painful. Instead of making the process easier, it somehow becomes its own issue that demands attention away from the fussy baby, which defeats it's purpose.
Super unreliable. Frequent app/software problems that render the baby monitor useless for several days at a time
absolutely brilliant, lots of fun

good functionality but the constant ads for plus have gotten extremely out of hand in the last year or so. Starting to look for other options for myself because its becoming obnoxious. Edit: they've responded with their bogstandard "everyone hates ads but they support us" response, which ok. But there are ads, and then there are ads to the point of making your app unusable, and you've left that line in the distant past. I get two ads before I can track, a third after I track, plus banner ads.
new update made it slow and not nice to use! loved the app for many years but just so you know it's suddenly slow
This is an incredible app and very useful 💕

Endless issues with App. The physical Nanit products work fine, but their software needs major improvements. The iOS version of the app works okay most of the time. The Android version of the app will endlessly buffer, or crash, rarely does it just work like it's supposed to. The app is always inconsistent, it'll go days performing with no issues, then a week with never ending issues.

Getting notifications, but the video seems to be working less every time. Connecting issues all the time. Having a high-speed internet with 5 GHz and 2.4 GHz connections seems to be not enough.Nanit is a great idea (though it is a bit expensive), but honestly, any camera can do the same thing without costing extra or adding a 5-10 second delay to the video. I'm not sure how much data you're collecting from my baby before displaying the "real-time" information on my device.

I never had an issue using the Owlet Care app for 2 years, but after accidentally uninstalling the old app, I couldn't get it to reinstall, so was forced to download the new version (Owlet Dream) and like others have stated, it sucks. it is a much larger app (145 MB vs. 25 MB right off the bat) and the video feed constantly stalls so you have to restart the app. I don't trust it for notifications and haven't traveled since the app update but I expect it to be terrible. worst product ever!
ive been using this for 8 years. love it
Good 👍🏾

The app is fine with a subscription. Once you stop paying though it is no longer "smart" about notifications. With AI mode on you only get temperature, humidity alerts, and sleep pad movement alerts when the camera detects a child. With AI mode off (which you need a subscription for) all the alerts fire independently, even when there is no child in the camera view. Hours since my subscription lapsed and I've gotten hundreds of critical alerts from the sleep sensor, and other alerts. Spam.

title: Really works
content: Perifit has kept me motivated with the pelvic floor workouts. The games make it fun and I get feedback on how I’m improving. Most importantly I hardly ever leak anymore. Truly life changing!

this app is a game changer when it comes to doing your kegels. unless you play games you can see originalization if you're doing your vehicles correctly. overall, I think this is like one of the best devices so you can get. the games are fun and it really does help. you work on your pelvic floor which is always a disaster after giving birth
the app updated and the old version is no longer supported and I lost all the data from my pregnancy. info I kept track off, important dates lost.

This is app is so helpful, and so is Ovia tech support!!! I've used the various apps for four years now and there are no others like it when it comes to tracking all things related to ladies' lives and hormones. Will never stop using this app.

Update 04/26, the camera now DOES NOT load any more (owned for over 4 years) It used to load once in a while, but now nothing. I am pretty tech savvy and have done all the basic troubleshooting. I would NOT recommend buying this camera to anyone. Without paying the subscription, the features were severely neutered.. Basically just live view, which, doesn't even work anymore.

It is beneficial for alleviating anxiety. We acquired the 360, and while we appreciate the device itself, the application can be quite slow. When the baby is being changed or fed, the alarm will sound, as he tends to move around. When I attempt to disable the alarm through the app, the screen often goes blank, necessitating multiple restarts of the application to restore functionality. On one occasion, this process took as long as ten minutes. Experiencing an unceasing beeping sound at 2 AM is c

you have to have the app up to catch the pop up to enter how many Oz you pumped. if you miss it is is HOURS before the session logs for you to update it so good luck remembering how much you pumped. if you turn off your pump no matter how long you pumped for it says session cannot be logged because it was less than 1 min. app is trash, but luckily you can use the pumps without it.
Help us a lot to take care of my daughter
never works. its 4am and it says my kid is awake but I cant see him at all.

I'm removing stars because this app is just straight up not working anymore. Since that last update the video won't show 90% of the time. When everything works it's great but it's been so frustrating.

the dream sock base has serious issues with my WiFi. if the router gets turned off the base won't reconnect to my WiFi no matter what. I've split the 2.4ghz channels and it's still won't connect. for the price the hardware is absolute rubbish.

base station is always disconnecting from wifi. works about 40% of the time. camera stopped connecting entirely since the recent update. so its been completely useless . products were decent until the update, now nothing works.
to be improved: 1. Constant network drops are super annoying and make me not recommend this app to others 2. the UX has improved but still not intuitive in many of my common use cases
I hate that it disconnects from the internet every time I go in to change it. that is very frustrating to have it take several extra steps each time.

title: A good product
content: This has transformed my life
loved this app until it stopped working one day and can't be used in the UK. it's really sad cos I used ovia for over 10 years and it was taken away without notice or regard for the customer.

This app is 'loading' more than showing video. Its audio will work in the background, then when you click the app upon hearing a noise, it loads loads loads. Problem hasn't been fixed for years (this is in different houses, internet providers, and routers). Super frustrating for an app that claims to offer quality streaming for childcare.

version 4.60.0.422 power button is finicky. and I cant use the night light. the launch on Amazon echo is so inconsistent. camera is too expensive to have these problems. apples app doesnt have any problems.
Buggy on purpose with older camera and now have to pay for every little extra
the camera no longer loads

I love my owlet but they REALLY need to improve the interface and fix data inconsistencies. You can look at your child's night sleep through two different views which provide different data for the same night. how could the same night have different lengths of sleep

Issues range from failing to change or add sleep routines to app shutting down when attempting to open it and random lack of connectivity to the clock. There needs to be a download version so that the app works with the clock 24/7, even during times of update or server issues whatever it may be. It seems like such a little thing, but one does not want to get in bed to find that their clock purchased for the express reason of helping them get to sleep (and wake) won't do what they wanted it to
amazing. incredible. AND FSA ELIGIBLE!!
worked for a while but now the camera doesnt even hook up anymore. we have tried calling and no support can figure it out. Android and Apple. 18 months old.

overall love the functionality but definitely have some pain points. first the Bluetooth connection drops easily and even when you dismiss the alert message it only dismisses for seconds to maybe a minute. third just some generally slow loading and loading issues. sometimes the graph just won't load or it'll load and you won't be able to actually click it to get the time, small stuff but they add up

Owlet support has been extremely poor and unhelpful. Despite clearly explaining the issue multiple times, responses are scripted and do not address the actual problem. The same troubleshooting steps and speed tests were repeatedly requested even after being completed. No real investigation has been done into an intermittent fault that occurs under identical conditions. Overall, the support process has been repetitive, unproductive, and has failed to resolve the issue. Don't waste your money
my wife gets much better sleep at night knowing this sock is checking are baby's heart rate oxygen level an much more was definitely worth the money
It randomly turns on light and sound throughout the night and wakes the baby up. The app interface sucks and doesn't let you disable it.
This app is broken. very disappointed.
a $300 camera shouldn't need a monthly plan to properly use it.

this app has so many glitches and issues. I have to close it and open it 5 times to get the proper readings or video to show up. Don't even get me started about trying to full screen video feed, which almost never works. It's a genuinely frustrating experience every single time I open the app.
Constantly reading as offline. a joke. get wyże instead.
Best worry relief device ever.
Making the Playlist are great but making the Playlist more personalized could be better. Overall through great app.
so bad. notification is lag. 40mins after baby cry. when baby is not around, getting useless notifications every minute for every reason.
This app is terrible. the user interface is bad and it's bad at doing the things it needs to do. it's faster and easier to get up and go press the physical buttons on the device
signed out and tried to log back in. changed the password and it's saying new password. it's still incorrect. has happened multiple times even though the password is saved in my password manager
No dark mode, no sync with Health connect or similar
Google home integration is terrible. Main reason I went with the Nanit system, VERY disappointed.
I love it! I love that you can keep track of everything that you need to do for the baby and you can keep track and watch her while she's napping and sleeping.
can't update to FDA regulations

SO refreshing to not have ads or things constantly popping up trying to get me to rate experience! So much wonderful information and supportive resources. Also love that is shows babies size and hand/foot size later on. Best pregnancy app in my opinion.
terrible app and camera doesn't connect.
cannot connect owlet smart sock 3
Having the Owl is good for peace of mind but the app is terrible. It's slow, it disconnects, it's frustrating.

Cannot connect to camera, multiple reboots, resets, wifi changes. Uninstall and reinstall is the only way to connect the camera then if the app is closed camera connection is lost until app is completely uninstalled and reinstalled.
I can never consistently connect to my device. it's infuriating to have to try multiple times, especially when I'm juggling a crying baby.

This app is the least positive experience I've had with the Eufy wearable pump. It's slow to respond to connections, it can give incorrect readings of the pump battery status and can implement mixed instructions. It could use an adjustment, but when it works it's great.
App never works would not recommend to new parents, especially if your baby has medical conditions.

title: It works!
content: Pelvic floor exercises are boring and feedback limited. The Perfit care system makes it fun, you get feedback and it works
I spent 300 dollars and cant connect to app seems like ALOT of people have this problem

Works okay, but has VERY slow connections from the app to the base stations/socks often. When you turn off base station from the app it glitches to say base station turned off but doesn't have the option to see the bottom menu bar for home, history, 360 etc unless you hard close and reopen the app.

This app is the single worst app I have ever experienced on a smart phone. Not one of its features work correctly. Regardless of what notifications settings you select, it notifies you of whatever it wants, whenever it wants. The video feed almost never works. The audio is terrible. Just yesterday, the app notified me it was 491° F in my son's room, which is 1. insane, and 2. funny because I've turned off temperature notifications multiple times! Truly, this garbage could not be worse.
Atrocious functionality for such an expensive device WITH a paid subscription. My device is usually unresponsive from the app.
Overall great, except keeps stalling on start every other time.
Can drain the battery when running in the background.
app is slow to load on the timeline section. it often has the wrong cycle day information so I have to completely close the app out 2-3 times before it refreshes

I was gifted The Owlet 2 and I can't even make it past registration. It would only let me set up an account if I selected Owlet not Cam 2 per the box. Now it won't connect to the wifi at all. I basically have a gift I can't even use.

I love this device, but getting it set up initially is quite the undertaking. Getting it to keep connection is such a pain. If it was easier, I would absolutely give it five stars Edit 4/1/26 I still love the sock and being able to monitor my baby's vitals but I have to say the connectivity issues even after setup are pretty consistent and support is virtually no help at all because they keep insisting it's a wifi problem for me despite me explaining that it's not. Wish the monitor was better

WARNING! EXHAUSTED MOTHER! This is an absolutely stupid product. It is a light with no buttons so you need an app. The app wants you to subscribe to pay more money for stupid sounds and your wifi data. Do not buy!
Edit: app connectivity issues are fixed. Works great now

My Bluetooth on my restore 3 is not working. Therefore, it doesn't carry out my sleep routine. I have to start my sleep sound manually each night. I have corrected permissions, unplugged, scanned for Bluetooth connection, pressed rest, nothing seems to work. App will not connect. Was excited, it was a Christmas gift, but not so much anymore. update I was able to get my Hatch online and working again.😁 🥳
this update has delayed notifications where it's telling me about what happened in my baby monitor like 30 minutes after the fact. worked great before.
always crashing
I love how you know how long the children have been sleeping
love the camera/monitor. dont love the price. I have 2 cameras. and the price is per canera.

The company wants additional subscription for things like body position, I've paid for the device so stop blocking it's features behind greedy paywalls, will not be recommending this product to anyone and will actively dissuade as many patents from it as possible.

absolutely the worst product and customer service we have ever experienced. Do not recommend this product. We purchased their product and it kept us up nights on end with flash alerts. Go buy the eufy sock we have had great experience with it. Owlette would not accept return and argues for a week with me until I gave up!!

Aweful product and app. You pay so much money for an item that is essentially a worse version of a speaker. It has to be plugged into the wall to function so it's not portable between rooms, it has to be connected to wifi to function so if your internet goes out then it's essentiall a brick, you only get 15 sounds to play without signing up for a monthly subscription, and the app doesn't stay connected so it has to reconnect every time you open it and it takes you back to your list of devices.

It really gave us peace of mind. One thing it does need to change is that it is dependent on your internet provider to work. So, if you have unstable internet or for some reason it stops working, your device won't work. This is for the sock plus base.
actually works!
good so far .....I just hope that it will be helpful 🙏
video feed constantly goes dark and won't load, app keeps freezing

I like the Hatch alarm clock, but there's just too much behind a pay wall. There's almost nothing for an alarm and wind down without paying even more. I like the concept, but am now a couple months in and bored of listening to the same 20 minutes of bird song. At least let people buy a particular sound bath for keeps instead of having to pay a subscription forever. Just go with a different sunset alarm.
very unreliable, and locks more and more features behind subscription over time

Unreliable, unstable app. Crashes randomly, which is extremely unsafe given this is designed for monitoring young children overnight. I have no faith in this app, will be looking at better quality alternatives.

Paid $1900 for our SNOO in 2023 and used all app features with our first child. We even recommended it to friends. Now in 2026, those same basic functions are locked behind a $25/month subscription. We already paid for this product, why are core features suddenly paywalled? Reached out to support and got the same “oh well” response. Shameful.

there was no point in incorporating an AI feature! especially when you removed the most helpful feature in the "mom" section - the feature that shows the last pump time and amount. it was a convenient quick access feature similar to how in "baby" it shows the last feed time and amount.
bugs in Android version. can't check battery percentage. poor UX all around.

title: Mrs
content: Excellent I would 100% recommend
fun and easy to use

Honestly we have tried a few different cameras but this one is by far the best in my opinion. You can check on your baby from anywhere, and it has a cool nanny feature that allows others limited access while they are baby sitting. It tracks all kinds of extra stuff for you as well. If I could give 6 stars I would.
wonderful tool, to be able to check on child at all times!
fantastic it's make sleeping easy with peace of mind.

This app woke up my child multiple times, it's so frustrating!! Fix this bs app once and for all as it costs a lot of money for nothing. I stopped the station as I'm not using the sock yet I keep getting alerts that it lost power.

App is buggy. Takes forever to open and load, somedays I click to try and open it and it just closes immediately. I LOVE the features Hatch has, but if you are going to sell an expensive product, with an expensive subscription that REQUIRES an app to work it better be a premium experience. I have had my Hatch Restore 3 for over a year now, love the device, hate the app.
love our babys hatch
the app won't even open for me. it keeps shutting down and when it does work and I go to select my hatch then that won't load! can't access anything.
won't let me open the app at all? makes it impossible to (re)set alarm schedule
I happily paid $700 for a Snoo 3 years ago and now I have to pay a subscription fee to make it useful. And there's also a useless "AI" feature now. Great example of enshittification.

You buy a $1500 bassinet, yet you still have to pay a subscription for the features of the app to work. Edit: Snoo claims that anyone who buys from them gets the premium subscription free. If this is true, why did it turn off on my account in the first place? Original account from day one and when my third kid came around, all the features went away. I can't even change the responsiveness without paying a subscription now. Can't find where to activate complementary premium anywhere!

I agree with what many reviews here say regarding the subscription. Beyond that though, it is just ok. My main issue is that the ux/ui is not designed for simple single hand use. Don't you understand that parents never have two hands free?

terrible. not helpful. time consuming. I was trying to get help in the app and you only get 3 free messages a day! and 10 total! a limit to the help I get! yeah no, I'm deleting it. not helpful, doesn't even work! if I'm using my phone to use it I shouldn't have to create an account! this is stupid and aggravating! I'm not even able to sync the snoo to the app. and needing to hook up to my Wi-Fi is another weird thing!

Buggy and awkward. Fails to connect to the BM4 baby monitor half the time, forcing me to return to the main app navigation and trying again. The timestamp for the monitor is an hour off. When updated in the base station, the app still won't show the new time. The playback feature is cumbersome to use. I wish there were a skip forward/backward features like YouTube.

We enjoy watching our grandson wake up & fall asleep. it's a greatly optional since we are 800 miles away. Wish we could here him. Wish we could download videos of him going to sleep and waking up that Nanit captures.
Such a blessing to not only make see our angel whenever, but know she is safe when we are trying to clean and sleep. Then the recaps are the cutest thing!

I love the owlet, the app is another matter, big problem for Android. if you leave the camera full screen. the app remembers. even if you close the app or it crashes. so if something happens to the camera and you have to reset the feed you might be stuck and have to uninstall and reinstall. it's really annoying.
don't push notification a review request

The cue not transitioning to unwind is annoying to the point that I turned the cue off. The UX for setting routines is cumbersome. It is way too difficult to just play something with lights e.g. what if I just want to do a calm meditation session during the middle of the day? Moved to a 1. If you don't subscribe you only get alarms, white noise, and a couple of routines like ASMR (creepy whisper voice) or meditations (I don't always need).
amazing!! both my children and I can't sleep without it!
I love the snoo but the app is so buggy. So often the snoo is not responsive to app controls which is incredibly frustrating first when baby is fussing, and second when paying a lot for premium
This is the only way I can commit to practicing. It keeps my interest. I keep coming back
not accurate. slow doesn't update.
awful connection
Camera fails to stay connected after only 1 year of use, nothing but a glorified paper weight at this point. Looking to replace camera with a different brand.

I really wish I hadn't introduced my daughter to these songs. the app is absolutely useless it glitches so much especially in android. it's constantly disconnecting from the device and I have to restart the app, or it just shows nothing even when it's actually playing something on the hatch.
